docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NORRIS,BREN BREN NORRIS ASSOCIATES INC AS TO DEFENDANT NAUTILUS INSURANCE CO C/O BURNS &WILCOX INS.SERVCS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22775, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
CORRES FROM P.J. TO PLTF, FILED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORRIS,BREN BREN NORRIS ASSOCIATES INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAUTILUS INSURANCE CO C/O BURNS &WILCOX INS.SERVCS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT NAUTILUS INSURANCE CO C/O BURNS &WILCOX INS.SERVCS
CORRES REC'D BY P.J. FROM PLTF.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORRIS,BREN BREN NORRIS ASSOCIATES INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAUTILUS INSURANCE CO C/O BURNS &WILCOX INS.SERVCS JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 22775 ON 11-10-93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO DAVID COOKSEY RETURNED SIGNED.
PLAINTIFF'S PETITION FOR REHEARING IN SUPER. COURT DENIED.
